facebookAccount.userAgent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 14; SM-S928B) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/131.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36
facebookAccount.notes: time the system automatically retrieves new cookies from email/password, unit is minute, if you set null, the system will not automatically retrieve new cookies, it saves you from having to manually change your cookie every time it expires. recommended set to 1440 (1day) or 4320 (3day).TO BE ABLE TO USE THIS FEATURE YOU NEED TO ENTER THE ACCOUNT PASSWORD ABOVE

notesLanguage: change to your language with ISO 639-1 code, available languages: vi (Vietnamese), en (English)

whiteListMode.notes: if you enable this feature, only the ids in the whiteListIds list can use the bot

database.notes: (1) type selects 'json' or 'sqlite' or 'mongodb'. If you choose mongodb, enter uri connect mongodb in the uriMongodb section. (2) when you set autoSyncWhenStart to true, the bot will automatically synchronize the data in the database when starting the bot. (3) when you set autoRefreshThreadInfoFirstTime to true, the bot will automatically refresh the thread information.

autoRestart.notes: you can set time is interval with milisecond or cron time. If you set time is 0 or false or null, the bot will not auto restart
